title: agent_query_session.v1
description: Agent traceability artifact for a single query session.

request.description: The exact query contract parameters used.

resolved_bundles.description: List of bundle identifiers (e.g., repo_ids or hashes) that were successfully resolved.

query_trace_ref.description: Reference (path/ID) to the generated query trace.

context_bundle_ref.description: Reference (path/ID) to the generated context bundle.

diagnostics_ref.description: Reference to additional diagnostics or federated conflicts.

warnings.description: Agent-guardrail warnings emitted during the session.
